summary: Team UX & Permission Refinement Pack testing completed - 15/15 backend tests passed (100%), All 3 new frontend pages working correctly. Role-based sidebar navigation filtering is operational with 41 nav items for admin.

minor.issue: When user_email is not provided, falls back to first admin user from DB regardless of user_role param. This is expected behavior for unauthenticated requests.

staff_dashboard_me.notes: Returns role-specific cards and quick_actions. Supports admin, sales, production, finance, marketing, support, supervisor roles.

supervisor_team_overview.notes: Returns summary with lead_count, open_task_count, order_count, service_request_count, quote_count, invoice_count, unpaid_invoices, total_revenue, staff_count

supervisor_team_performance.notes: Returns performance metrics per staff member: email, lead_count, won_count, total_value, conversion_rate, total_tasks, completed_tasks

supervisor_team_staff_list.notes: Returns list of staff members without password_hash. Correctly returns 403 for non-admin roles.

staff_workspace_page.notes: Page loads with welcome message, role-specific stats cards (4 cards for admin), quick actions (New Lead, New Quote), and Daily Focus guidance.

control_panel_page.notes: Page loads with global metrics (Total Leads, Active Quotes, Total Orders, Total Revenue), secondary metrics, Staff Performance leaderboard, Quick Navigation links.

staff_performance_page.notes: Page loads with detailed performance table showing Rank, Staff Member, Role, Leads, Won, Conversion Rate, Total Tasks, Completed, Pipeline Value.

sidebar_navigation_filtering.notes: Admin sees 41 navigation items including new items: Control Panel, Staff Workspace, Staff Performance, Customer Accounts. Role filtering logic in AdminLayout.js and roleModuleAccess.js is correctly implemented.

new_nav_items.notes: All new items visible: Dashboard, Control Panel, Staff Workspace, Staff Performance under Overview section

critical_code_review_comments: staff_dashboard_routes.py: Clean role-based card generation with proper MongoDB queries
supervisor_team_routes.py: Good aggregation pipelines for performance metrics
StaffWorkspaceHomePage.jsx: Well-designed with data-testid attributes, responsive cards
SuperAdminControlPanelPage.jsx: Comprehensive metrics display with Staff Performance leaderboard
StaffPerformancePage.jsx: Clean table layout with ranking indicators
roleModuleAccess.js: Clear role-to-module mapping for 8 different roles
AdminLayout.js: Proper navigation filtering using getFilteredNavItems()

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 3 new pages load and function correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Team UX & Permission Refinement Pack fully tested and working. All backend endpoints (/api/staff-dashboard/me, /api/supervisor-team/overview, /api/supervisor-team/performance, /api/supervisor-team/staff-list) return correct data. Frontend pages (/staff, /admin/control-panel, /admin/staff-performance) load correctly with proper data. Role-based sidebar navigation filtering is operational - admin sees all 41 items, other roles see filtered subsets. The Customer Accounts link issue from previous iteration is now fixed and visible in sidebar.
